/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -flto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/demgpu.dir/link.d -shared  -o demgpu.cpython-313-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/demgpu.dir/src/main_binding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/demgpu.dir/src/simulation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/demgpu.dir/src/mpi/domain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/demgpu.dir/src/mpi/communicator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/demgpu.dir/src/cuda/integration.cu.o CMakeFiles/demgpu.dir/src/cuda/broadphase.cu.o CMakeFiles/demgpu.dir/src/cuda/solver.cu.o CMakeFiles/demgpu.dir/cmake_device_link.o   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-13.0/targets/x86_64-linux/lib:/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib: /usr/local/cuda-13.0/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi.so -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
